Revisiting the Past: Data Unlearning with Model State History

Keivan Rezaei · Mehrdad Saberi · Abhilasha Ravichander · Soheil Feizi

presentation:
Oral Session 1A Example Track Project Page

Abstract

Large language models are trained on massive corpora of web data.

MSA utilizes prior model checkpoints.
